mainEntity.name: What costs are involved in hiring an agency for Google AI Overviews optimization in Chicago?
mainEntity.text: What costs are involved in hiring an agency for Google AI Overviews optimization in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: Chicago agencies charge $3,000-$10,000/month for AI Overviews optimization, including content creation, SEO audits, and review management tailored to Illinois legal queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Costs depend on firm size; entry-level packages focus on content, while premium include AI-specific tracking. Chicago firms risk overpaying for generic SEO—vet for proven AI citations. ROI comes from qualified leads; compare against in-house efforts.
